name_en: Large 🔮🔮🔮 OHANEL 🚩🚩🚩 25P Latest patchwork suede, new version uses gold plating technology 🤩 31bag is the explosive presence of this season! mini31bag is a breakout hit! Very light weight, combines leather chain and fine leather shoulder strap. Whether it's the chain length or bag size, it's more suitable for petite sisters. Truly a surprise. Cute and stylish feeling hits you instantly, highly recommended! Dimensions: 22*23*5.5cm
